title: US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill
summary: US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill
briefing: Donald Trump confirmed on social media that he would not sign the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a ban on a US CBDC until the end of 2030, setting the stage for the bill to become law on Saturday.
